name: OLAPLEX HOLDINGS, INC.
business: OLAPLEX is a health and beauty company that develops and sells hair care products using patent-protected bond-building technology, primarily Bis-aminopropyl diglycol dimaleate. The company's product portfolio includes approximately 30 products designed for use by professional hairstylists and consumers to repair and maintain hair health.
sellsTo: professional hairstylists (Pros) through beauty supply distributors
consumers via specialty retailers and direct-to-consumer channels
international markets through distributors and direct investment

exposures.sentence: OLAPLEX is a foundational health and beauty company powered by breakthrough innovation that starts with and is inspired by the professional hairstylist (Pro).

catalysts.event: Introduction of refreshed visual identity for product packaging
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal year 2026, we are introducing a refreshed visual identity for our product packaging that seeks to elevate our packaging design to reflect our brand identity.

tamClaims.claim: Global retail haircare market size in 2024 was $93 billion with CAGR of 6% from 2024 to 2029
tamClaims.sentence: According to Euromonitor, in 2024, consumers spent an estimated $93 billion globally on retail haircare products, with consumer retail spend anticipated to grow at a compound annual growth rate of approximately 6% from 2024 to 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Prestige haircare market in the US was $4.9 billion in 2025, up 8% from 2024
tamClaims.sentence: According to Circana, in the United States, OLAPLEX's home market, prestige haircare sales were $4.9 billion in 2025, an increase of 8% compared to 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Consumers spend over $200 billion globally on salon haircare services annually
tamClaims.sentence: In addition, consumers are estimated to spend over $200 billion globally on salon haircare services annually.
